title: Plutarch, Moralia: Letter of Condolence to Apollonius
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Letter of Condolence to Apollonius.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Letter of Condolence to Apollonius.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Letter of Condolence to Apollonius': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
